name: Household action card page refactor
description: Refactored household list and household detail surfaces to use PageShell/DataState and a shared callback-driven ActionCard. The household create card now always appears as the final households grid item, while the admin invite-member card always appears below the household member list and opens the existing invite dialog through parent-owned dialog state.

evidence.description: Households route now uses PageShell and DataState, keeps list loading/error retry handling localized, and delegates success content to the households list section.

Generic reusable ActionCard supports optional outer title/description, dashed card content, composed icon content, action title/description/label, and a centered default small button that emits onAction to the caller.

Responsive household grid maps existing summary cards, always appends CreateHouseholdActionCard as the final grid item, and opens the create dialog through an onAction callback with triggerless controlled dialog state.
Household-specific create and invite variants adapt the shared ActionCard with localized copy and composed Plus/Avatar media.
Member card now uses DataState for loading/empty/error states and no longer nests the invite-member action card.
Household detail route now uses PageShell and DataState while rendering the admin invite-member action card as a sibling card outside the members card.
Create dialog accepts optional custom or null trigger props while preserving the default create button and form behavior.
Invite dialog accepts optional controlled open state and custom or null trigger props while preserving invite-link generation and copy behavior.
Repository typecheck verification passed after adding the localized load-failure key.
Final full verification passed, including install, harness, lint, typecheck, test, and GitNexus sync steps.
Final GitNexus change detection found no affected execution processes.
